documentation.file_docstring: Regression test for #18264: Gateway announcement delivery loop. When `runSubagentAnnounceFlow` repeatedly returns `false` (deferred), `finalizeSubagentCleanup` must eventually give up rather than retrying forever via the max-retry and expiration guards.
inline_comments: Add a run that has already ended and exhausted retries
Ended 10 minutes ago (well past ANNOUNCE_EXPIRY_MS of 5 min).
Initialization attempts resume once, then gives up for exhausted entries.
